# passwork_folder (Data Source)

Fetches a Passwork folder by name within a specific vault.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "passwork_vault" "prod" {
  name = "Production Secrets"
}

data "passwork_folder" "infra" {
  name     = "Infrastructure"
  vault_id = data.passwork_vault.prod.id
}

output "folder_id" {
  value = data.passwork_folder.infra.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the folder to look up.
- `vault_id` (String) ID of the vault to search within.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Folder identifier.
- `parent_folder_id` (String) ID of the parent folder.
